title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
The Government of India has authorised IDBI Bank to open Small Savings Schemes accounts through all its branches across India.
  * An account holder can deposit any amount between Rs. 500/- (minimum) and Rs. 1,50,000/-(maximum) in a Financial Year. Rate of Interest 7.10% per annum*.
  * Loan facility is available from the 3 Financial Year up to the 6 Financial Year.
  * The Account matures on completion of 15 complete Financial Years from the end of the year in which the account was opened.
  * After maturity, the account can be extended for any number of block periods of 5 years each.
  * Deposits can be made in PPF account using IDBI Net Banking & Go Mobile Plus Mobile application.


  * Minimum deposit Rs. 250/- and Maximum Rs. 1,50,000/- in a Financial Year.
  * “One Girl One Account” up to two girl children or three in case of twin girls as 2 or 1 birth itself results in three girl children.
  * Parents/legal guardians can open SSA on behalf of a girl child, aged below 10 years.
  * Maturity Tenure : 21 years from the date of opening of the account.
  * Deposits can be made in SSA account using IDBI Net Banking.


  * For Senior citizens of India aged 60 years or above. Rate of Interest 8.20% per annum#* or Retirees who have opted for the Voluntary Retirement Scheme (VRS) or Superannuation aged between 55-60. Here the investment has to be done within a month of receiving the retirement benefits or Retired defense personnel with a minimum age of 50 years.
  * Maximum Deposit of Rs. 30 Lakhs for individual and minimum deposit amount Rs. 1000/- and in multiples of Rs. 1000/-.
  * Quarterly Interest payout, Interest will paid on 1 working day of April/ July/ October/ January.
  * Tenor is for 5 years, account can be extended for any number of a block period of 3 years each.
  * Eligible for Tax Deduction under section 80C of the Income Tax Act, 1961 but TDS is applicable on Interest earned.
  * Online Link for submission of Form 121 for Senior Citizens Savings Scheme. Please 
  * Link of TDS certificate for Senior Citizens Savings Scheme, please 


#Interest Rate is fixed for block of first 5 years.
For more information kindly visit National Saving Institute (NSI) website or Ministry of Finance website 
###### PPF Form G - Application for Withdrawal by Nominees/Legal Heirs

metadata.description: The aim of the Public Provident Fund (PPF) scheme offered by IDBI bank is to mobilize small savings by offering an investment with reasonable returns combined with income tax benefits.
metadata.keywords: Public Provident Fund , ppf, ppf account
